description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the clojure:lein Docker image and includes a mock-api-service service from registry.gitlab.com/xapix/mock-api-service:v0.0.1 with the alias mock-api-service. Define a single test stage and set the variable LEIN_SNAPSHOTS_IN_RELEASE to "true". Add a clj-soap-tests job in the test stage that runs the command lein cloverage --fail-threshold 81. Configure the job to collect the target/coverage/ directory as an artifact after execution. The job runs on all branches without additional rules or caches.
